billing.cancelSuccess: Your subscription will be canceled at the end of the current period.
billing.cancelError: Failed to cancel subscription. Please try again.
billing.cancelScheduledHint: Cancellation is already scheduled; access continues until the next renewal date.
billing.cancelDisabledNoPaid: There is no paid subscription to cancel.
billing.checkoutStartError: Failed to start checkout. Check your T‑Kassa configuration and try again.
billing.downgradeBlockedTooltip:
To switch to a lower plan,
contact support or cancel your subscription and wait until it ends

paymentReturn.localNoWebhook: Locally, T‑Kassa won’t call the webhook — the subscription won’t update until you have a public URL (ngrok, etc.).
paymentReturn.success: Payment received. The subscription will update after T‑Kassa confirmation (usually within a minute).

billing.clearPaymentHistoryDialogDescription: This removes all payment records from your account. Your subscription status is not changed.
billing.clearPaymentHistoryError: Could not clear payment history. Try again.
billing.cancelConfirmDescription: Your subscription stays active until {date}. After that, automatic charges stop.
billing.cancelConfirmDateUnknown: the end of the paid period

checkoutModal.title: Checkout: {plan}
checkoutModal.subtitle: Choose how you pay and confirm the terms before you continue to payment.
checkoutModal.oneTimeHint: Single payment for one month of access. No automatic charges after the period ends.
checkoutModal.recurringHint: Charged every 30 days until you cancel in billing settings.
checkoutModal.checkboxOneTimeLabel: I agree to the one-time charge
checkoutModal.checkboxOneTimeDescription: I authorize a one-time charge of {price} ₽ for {plan} access for 1 month. There will be no automatic charges.
checkoutModal.checkboxRecurringChargeDescription: I authorize monthly charges of {price} ₽ until I cancel. The first charge is today.
checkoutModal.checkboxCancelHowtoDescription: You can turn off auto-renewal anytime under Billing → Cancel subscription (settings → billing).
checkoutModal.infoOneTime: Next charge: none. After the period ends, paid access ends automatically.
checkoutModal.infoRecurring: Next charge: in 30 days. You can cancel anytime under Billing.
checkoutModal.checkoutError: Could not start checkout. Check your T‑Kassa settings and try again.
